metadata.title: The 2022 crypto collapse cascade — Terra/LUNA -> 3AC -> Celsius/Voyager/BlockFi -> Genesis/DCG -> FTX/Alameda, the founders, and the prosecutions
metadata.status: collapses, amounts, sentences, and corporate structures are FACT (public record / adjudicated); the contagion-ordering is well-documented; no claim beyond the adjudicated findings is asserted
metadata.frame: The corpus tracked the SINK of 'wiped investors' and the Terra stablecoin failure but never drew the CASCADE that connected them — the 2022 domino chain that erased ~$2T of crypto market cap and produced the largest financial-fraud prosecutions of the decade. This block wires it: the first domino (Terra/LUNA, May 2022), the leveraged fund that blew up on it (Three Arrows Capital), the lenders that 3AC took down (Celsius, Voyager, BlockFi, Genesis), the holding company behind Genesis (DCG/Grayscale/Barry Silbert), and the exchange whose own fraud detonated in November (FTX/Alameda). Plus the principals and where they ended up. Ties to macro-stablecoin-failures-manipulation (Terra), spec-cross-system-contagion (the propagation mechanics), spec-crypto-enforcement-actors (who prosecuted them), and spec-crypto-sec-epstein.

the_cascade: The order matters. (1) TERRA/LUNA (Terraform Labs, Do Kwon) — the algorithmic stablecoin UST de-pegged in May 2022, vaporizing ~$40B+ and detonating the chain. (2) THREE ARROWS CAPITAL (3AC; Su Zhu, Kyle Davies) — a ~$10B hedge fund heavily long Luna/GBTC/staked-ETH on borrowed money; insolvent within weeks, defaulting on loans across the lending sector. (3) THE LENDERS — 3AC's defaults blew up Celsius (Mashinsky), Voyager, BlockFi, and Genesis, which had lent it billions; they froze withdrawals and filed bankruptcy through mid-2022. (4) DCG/GENESIS — Genesis (owned by Digital Currency Group, Barry Silbert; sibling to Grayscale/GBTC) was central to the inter-lender web; Genesis later SUED its own parent DCG + Silbert to recover billions allegedly drained. (5) FTX/ALAMEDA (Nov 2022) — separately, FTX's hedge fund Alameda (Caroline Ellison) had been secretly funded with FTX CUSTOMER deposits; a liquidity run exposed an ~$8B hole and collapsed the #2 exchange, taking BlockFi (which FTX had 'rescued') and freezing Gemini Earn (run through Genesis) with it. grade: fact (the sequence + amounts are adjudicated/documented).

the_principals_and_outcomes.sam_bankman_fried: FTX founder/CEO. Convicted (Nov 2023) on 7 counts of fraud/conspiracy; SENTENCED TO 25 YEARS (Mar 2024) over the ~$8B customer shortfall. grade: fact (adjudicated).
the_principals_and_outcomes.caroline_ellison: Alameda Research CEO; SBF's lieutenant and the prosecution's star witness; sentenced to 2 years + ordered to forfeit ~$11B. grade: fact.
the_principals_and_outcomes.do_kwon: Terraform Labs founder; extradited; SENTENCED TO 15 YEARS (Dec 2025) for the Terra/LUNA fraud (separate from the SEC settlement). grade: fact.
the_principals_and_outcomes.alex_mashinsky: Celsius CEO; pleaded guilty; SENTENCED TO 12 YEARS (May 2025); CFTC lifetime ban. grade: fact.
the_principals_and_outcomes.barry_silbert: DCG founder/CEO; Genesis's Delaware suit (unsealed 2025) alleges DCG drained Genesis of ~$2.1B via reckless loans/deceptive transactions; NYAG Genesis settlement; not criminally charged. grade: fact (the suits/settlement); the allegations are litigated, not adjudicated criminal findings.
the_principals_and_outcomes.su_zhu_kyle_davies: 3AC co-founders; the fund liquidated; Su Zhu briefly jailed (contempt) in Singapore; both launched a (widely-criticized) 'claims exchange' afterward. grade: fact.

the_survivors: The contrast that matters: the exchanges/issuers that DIDN'T commingle or over-lever largely survived and are now incumbents — Coinbase (Brian Armstrong), Binance (CZ — though CZ pleaded guilty to BSA failures, the exchange survived), Gemini (the Winklevoss twins — though Gemini Earn froze). The collapse was a SOLVENCY/FRAUD event concentrated in the leverage-and-commingling firms, not a blockchain-technology failure — an important distinction the 'crypto is a scam' narrative flattens (graded interpretation).
the_adjacent_enforcement: Adjacent actions, graded separately: SEC v. Tron/Justin Sun (fraud + market-manipulation allegations; PAUSED in 2025 after Sun invested ~$75M in the Trump-linked World Liberty Financial — a documented conflict-of-timing, cf. influence-operator-network); Grayscale v. SEC (Grayscale WON — the spot-Bitcoin-ETF denial ruled 'arbitrary and capricious', forcing approvals); BitMEX/Arthur Hayes (BSA guilty plea 2022; pardoned by Trump 2025). status: fact.
the_honest_reading: Two things are simultaneously true and the narrative usually collapses them: (1) there was MASSIVE, real, adjudicated FRAUD (FTX customer theft, Celsius lies, Terra's misrepresentations) that destroyed retail savers and warranted the prosecutions; AND (2) the failure mode was leverage + commingling + unbacked yield — i.e. the OLDEST forms of financial fraud wearing crypto clothing — NOT a novel property of blockchains, and the survivors prove the distinction. The wipeout fed the SINK of erased investors the corpus already tracks; the prosecutions fed the enforcement pendulum (spec-crypto-enforcement-actors). Overlay; excluded from the proofs.
